response.global_analysis: 1. Audio & Visual Match: The video contains instrumental music for the first 3 minutes and 50 seconds, followed by spoken English narration that matches the scrolling on-screen text, and finally a Japanese vocal song cover starting at 04:48.000. 2. Subtitle Processing: Transcribed the English narration directly and translated the Japanese lyrics of the song 'Gurenge' covered by the character. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the subtitles to synchronize precisely with the narrator's voice and the vocal singing.

subtitles.original: In a kingdom far far away where all Nyut-Nyut lives,
subtitles.english: In a kingdom far far away where all Nyut-Nyut lives,

subtitles.original: a sudden calamity strikes among the Nyut-Nyut who lives in harmony.
subtitles.english: a sudden calamity strikes among the Nyut-Nyut who lives in harmony.

subtitles.original: A pink giant monster has emerged out of nowhere and created havoc everywhere.
subtitles.english: A pink giant monster has emerged out of nowhere and created havoc everywhere.

subtitles.original: A lot of buildings and villages were destroyed.
subtitles.english: A lot of buildings and villages were destroyed.

subtitles.original: until a mysterious magical squirrel arrived to find a legendary weapon, the Nut Blade.
subtitles.english: until a mysterious magical squirrel arrived to find a legendary weapon, the Nut Blade.

subtitles.original: The legend said that this mysterious squirrel will bring an end to this calamity...
subtitles.english: The legend said that this mysterious squirrel will bring an end to this calamity...

subtitles.original: 強くなれる理由を知った
subtitles.english: I learned the reason why I can be strong
Take me with you and move forward
